description: Authoritative DNS service contract v1 — 13 operations for managing zones and records on authoritative DNS providers (Cloudflare DNS, Route53, Vultr DNS, DigitalOcean DNS). Supports record types: A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, NS, SRV, CAA, SOA (read-only), PTR. Distinct from protective-dns-v1 which targets DNS filtering / managed resolvers.

operations.description: List DNS records on a zone with filters for name, type, and content
operations.name: record_list

operations.description: Create a DNS record (A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, NS, SRV, CAA, PTR)
operations.name: record_create

operations.description: Delete a DNS record (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: record_delete

operations.description: Retrieve a single DNS record by ID
operations.name: record_get

operations.description: List authoritative DNS zones for the account
operations.name: zone_list

operations.description: Get details for a single zone (nameservers, status, plan, account)
operations.name: zone_get

operations.description: Create multiple DNS records in a single operation
operations.name: record_bulk_create

operations.description: Update multiple DNS records in a single operation
operations.name: record_bulk_update

operations.description: Check whether a domain is available for registration
operations.name: domain_check_availability

operations.description: Set custom nameservers on a zone (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: nameserver_set

operations.description: Create a new authoritative DNS zone
operations.name: zone_create

operations.description: Delete a DNS zone and all its records (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: zone_delete

title: dns-authoritative-v1
